strengths: Demonstrated loop introduction and positioning phases
Maintained instrument control during visible portions of the attempt
weaknesses: Excessive motion blur prevented clear assessment of task completion
Unable to verify proper loop securing and tail cutting due to video quality
Camera stability issues compromised visual feedback throughout the procedure

drills.name: Camera centering reset
drills.description: 3 minutes of centering and re-centering the work target before the first move
drills.targets_weakness: Camera stability issues compromised visual feedback throughout the procedure

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: 10 repetitions of opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening
drills.targets_weakness: Unable to verify proper loop securing and tail cutting due to video quality

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the task phase slowly with minimal wasted regrasping to reduce motion blur
drills.targets_weakness: Excessive motion blur prevented clear assessment of task completion

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on maintaining stable camera positioning and deliberate movements to ensure clear visual feedback. Practice the complete sequence slowly before attempting to increase speed.
